title: podman equavalent for `docker trust inspect ...`
body:
/kind feature

**Description**

I'm searching for the equivalent of `docker trust inspect alpine`. For compatibility with docker I think that should be added. furthermore I can't find any documentation with regards to enabling content trust.

In Docker this can be done using `DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST=1`.

I have checked this using the `quay.io/podman/stable:latest` with image id `4c0f1fd71288`.

comments.body:
Podman does not support Notary.  This would require community to get support.  It does support Simple Signing.

podman image trust 
podman image sign
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
